description: Plugin-distributed hooks for hospitality-hotels. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags hotel revenue anti-patterns (rate change with no demand basis, OTA channel with no net-ADR note, hard-coded occupancy/ADR with no date, overbooking policy with no no-show/walk basis). Set HOSPITALITY_HOTELS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
